national_mail_in: see gold-domains buyers.ts — scored tier, available in all metros

buyers.name: Boston Estate Buyers
buyers.hours: By appointment only (call or text); no walk-ins
buyers.payout_claims: "115% guarantee that we will beat the price of any nationally advertised gold or jewelry buyer or we will pay you 15% more"
buyers.testing_transparency: No testing method described on site.
buyers.evidence_notes: In the Boston Jewelers Building (Downtown Crossing) "since 1959"; site states "Our licensed and bonded buyers will travel to your home or office to provide you with a jewelry appraisal." Free appraisals; buys gold, diamonds, platinum, antique and estate jewelry. "At this time we cannot accept walk-in appointments."

buyers.name: The Gold Rush
buyers.hours: Mon–Wed & Fri 10:30am–5pm, Thu 10:30am–5:30pm, Sun 11:30am–3:30pm; Sat closed
buyers.payout_claims: "a great reputation for paying among the highest prices" — no numbers posted
buyers.testing_transparency: "Test each piece to determine its karat," then weighs and factors against current market prices; specific testing equipment not named.
buyers.evidence_notes: MetroWest (Natick) dedicated gold/diamond buyer; lists GIA and EGL memberships; free gold appraisals, cash on the spot, sale takes 15–20 minutes. "Walk-in sellers are welcome"; appointments recommended for large lots for privacy.

buyers.name: LBC Boston (Boston Pawn Shop / Cash For Gold Boston)
buyers.payout_claims: "pay 90-98% for gold coins"; claims to "consistently pay more than jewelry stores and online buyers"
buyers.testing_transparency: "Our experts test your items in front of you using professional tools" — in-front-of-you testing stated, equipment not named.
buyers.evidence_notes: Prominent Allston/BU-corridor pawnbroker with a dedicated cash-for-gold page; "Testing and appraisals are completely free" with "no obligation to sell"; also advertises 3% collateral loans. No appointment needed — walk-ins during business hours.

buyers.name: Bromfield Jewelers (Estate Buyers LLC)
buyers.payout_claims: "offer you the highest return (and with that, peace of mind) for your gold" — no numbers posted
buyers.testing_transparency: No testing method described on the gold-buyers page; page does explain karat math ("a piece of 14k jewelry is about 58% gold").
buyers.evidence_notes: Downtown Crossing jewelry-district jeweler "buying and selling gold in Boston and surrounding communities for well over 20 years"; free appraisals during regular business hours, walk-ins accepted; buys gold, diamonds, watches, estate jewelry, silver, coins, flatware. Hours from search listing, not the fetched page.

buyers.name: CJWB — Cambridge Jewelry & Watch Buyers
buyers.payout_claims: "Competitive market-based pricing" and "highest price possible" — no numbers posted
buyers.testing_transparency: Evaluates on purity, weight, and current market value; no testing equipment or on-camera process described.
buyers.evidence_notes: Appointment-only private evaluations inside the Jewelers Building, Downtown Crossing. Owner Jim Vellucci is a GIA Graduate Gemologist, member of the International Watch and Jewelers Guild and Boston Jewelers Club. "No pressure. No obligation."

buyers.name: Kosmima Fine Jewelry
buyers.payout_claims: Claims "the highest price" with "competitive and accurate" rates; "we closely monitor international market values for precious metals throughout the day" — no numbers posted
buyers.testing_transparency: "The necessary technology and knowledge needed to accurately appraise their karats, weights, and true value" — method not named.
buyers.evidence_notes: Brookline/Chestnut Hill jeweler with a dedicated gold-buying page; "over 40 years of experience," serving Greater Boston 30+ years. Appointment link on site; walk-ins not explicitly excluded.

buyers.name: Boston Bullion, LLC
buyers.payout_claims: Buys and sells gold, silver, platinum, palladium at live spot-based prices ("Gold & Silver at Live Spot Prices"); final pricing confirmed by phone at order time
buyers.testing_transparency: Not verified — site blocks automated fetch; spot-price display is the visible pricing basis.
buyers.evidence_notes: Family-owned bullion dealer since 2006, north-suburban Burlington; BBB business profile exists (coin dealers category). Site returned HTTP 403 to fetches — details assembled from its own page titles/contact-page snippets in search results, so all fields need on-site confirmation.
